Deepwater Horizon (2016)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $61,433,527Details
International Box Office $60,899,591
Worldwide Box Office $122,333,118
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $8,425,383
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $7,541,162
Total $15,966,545
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Based on the true events that occurred on an oil rig in the Gulf of Mexico on April 20, 2010, the story chronicles the courage of those who worked on the Deepwater Horizon and the extreme moments of bravery and survival in the face of what would become one of the biggest man-made disasters in world history.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$20,223,544 (32.9% of total gross)
Legs:3.04 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:50.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$156,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,259 opening theaters/3,403 max. theaters, 4.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $84,941,618

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 30th, 2016 (Wide) by Lionsgate
September 30th, 2016 (IMAX) by Lionsgate
International Releases: September 29th, 2016 (Wide) (Netherlands)
September 30th, 2016 (Wide), released as Horizonte Profundo (Mexico)
September 30th, 2016 (Wide) (Russia (CIS))
September 30th, 2016 (Wide), released as Deepwater Horizon: Moře v plamenech (Czech Republic)
September 30th, 2016 (Wide), released as Liepsnojantis horizontas (Lithuania)
Video Release: December 20th, 2016 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for prolonged intense disaster sequences and related disturbing images, and brief strong language.
(Rating bulletin 2437 (Cert #50467), 8/10/2016)
Running Time: 107 minutes
Film format: IMAX: DMR
Plot point: Corporate Malfeasance, Disaster, Environment
Subgenre: Action Thriller
Time period setting: 2010s
Source:Based on Real Life Events
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Dramatization
Production/Financing Companies: Participant Media, di Bonaventura Pictures, Summit Entertainment, Closest to the Hole, Leverage
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Based on the true events that occurred on an oil rig in the Gulf of Mexico on April 20, 2010, the story chronicles the courage of those who worked on the Deepwater Horizon and the extreme moments of bravery and survival in the face of what would become one of the biggest man-made disasters in world history.
